prompt: Using the uploaded portrait as a reference, design a high-end, minimalist, Apple-style Chinese coach promotional poster. Overall Visual Style: Modern, clean, restrained, premium, and minimalist, similar to the visual language of Apple product launch posters. The layout should feature ample whitespace, soft lighting, a light gray-white background, and exquisite typography. No Apple logos, no redundant decorations, and no complex backgrounds. Subject Presentation: Retain the person's authentic facial features and temperament, making them appear professional, approachable, and confident. Attire should be a light gray blazer + white crew neck/white shirt, maintaining a clean studio photography quality. Position the person on the right or center-right of the frame with a half-body composition, natural soft lighting, clear face, and a background with a white-to-light-gray gradient. Layout: Text on the left, portrait on the right. Use modern sans-serif Chinese fonts in black or dark gray with clear hierarchy and breathing room. Main title largest, subtitle medium, and abilities smaller, all neatly aligned for a premium brand feel. Poster Text: Main Title: Bear Awakening, Subtitle: Text Creation Artist, Abilities: Specializing in short-form writing, Action empowerment, Traffic acquisition. Design Specs: Vertical poster, 4:5 ratio. Color palette: white, light gray, dark gray, black. Avoid flashy colors, cartoon styles, exaggerated poses, or cluttered elements.
